subject: Plan OpenTargets variants merge
description: Stage OpenTargets variants in scratch and decide a bounded path for mutation_in_gene, mutation_affects_transcript, and mutation_causes_protein_change using existing mutation/transcript/protein nodes.
result: Planned OpenTargets variants merge. Staged OT 26.03 variant locally (25 files, 3.2G, 7,432,549 rows). Patched ingest_variants to use mutation schema hgvs/clinvar_id/gnomad_id, map protein-change edges to ENSP through unambiguous UniProt xrefs, and lower variant batch size. One-file smoke passed: 311,562 mutation nodes, 11,652,040 mutation_in_gene, 11,652,040 mutation_affects_transcript, 8,563 mutation_causes_protein_change, peak RSS 6.5G. Decision: do not blindly promote full gene/transcript variant relations; next bounded slice is mutation_causes_protein_change ENSP only.
